summary: A Go-based monolithic orchestration tool utilizing MCP handlers and a custom test runner, heavily augmented by automated AI agent-generated test suites.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated/agent-produced test files (glm-agents) cluttering the repository
Potential test flakiness or redundancy due to multiple overlapping extra test suites
Staged but uncommitted changes indicating possible workflow interruption
suggestions: Archive or consolidate the numerous GOrchestra/glm-agents test directories to reduce repository bloat
Ensure the 1 staged file is properly committed or stashed to maintain a clean working tree
Review assertion_wire_test.go for test isolation and proper mocking of dependencies
